    label() - Method in record class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.SidebarBuilder.NavEntry
    Returns the value of the label record component.

    LibraryHandler - Record Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A lightweight context record that bundles the core services and callbacks required by the library view layer.

    Creates an instance of a LibraryHandler record class.

    Thin facade for song, album, and artist retrieval.

    LibraryState - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Holds all mutable view state for the My Library page.

    LibraryTopBarBuilder - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Builds the top bar for the My Library page.

    LibraryTopBarBuilder.GenreOption - Record Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Display wrapper for Genre in the ComboBox.
    LibraryTopBarBuilder.Result - Record Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Carries all built nodes back to the controller so it can hold references for later style updates without traversing the scene graph.
    ListeningHistoryService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers
    Service for managing user listening history with pagination support.

    Loads paginated listening history rows for the Analytics page.

    Pagination service for analytics listings (songs, artists, albums).

    listeningTime - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.TopArtistRowData
     
    listToggle() - Method in record class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.LibraryTopBarBuilder.Result
    Returns the value of the listToggle record component.
    loadAllTimeStatsForGraph(int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.ChartViewModel
    Time Complexity: O(y) where y = number of years in history Space Complexity: O(1).
    loadAndShow(StackPane, String, Supplier, Function, Function, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.GenericModalLoader
    Loads a full dataset asynchronously, maps each raw item to a display DTO, then opens a paginated modal backed entirely by the in-memory list.
    loadAsync(Supplier, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.DataLoadingService
     
    loadAsync(Supplier, Consumer, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.DataLoadingService
     
    loadAvailableMonths(int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.MonthlyReportViewModel
    Loads available months for a given year.
    loadAvailableWeeks(int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.WeeklyReportViewModel
    Loads available weeks for a given year.
    loadChartData(int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.ChartViewModel
    Time Complexity: O(y + n) where y = available years, n = total playback records Space Complexity: O(m * s) where m = 12 months, s ≤ 3 series = O(1)
    loadHistoryCount(Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.ListeningHistoryViewModel
    Gets total count of listening history.
    loadHistoryWindow(int, int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.ListeningHistoryViewModel
    Loads a window of listening history with pagination.
    loadMonthlyReport(int, int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.MonthlyReportViewModel
    Loads monthly report data asynchronously for a given year and month.
    loadStatCardsData(Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.StatCardsViewModel
     
    loadTopAlbumsCount(Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopAlbumsViewModel
    Gets total count of top albums.
    loadTopAlbumsWindow(int, int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopAlbumsViewModel
    Loads a window of top albums with pagination.
    loadTopArtistsData(Consumer, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopArtistsViewModel
    Loads a ranked list of top artists asynchronously for display in a preview or panel, delivering results to onSuccess on the JavaFX thread.
    loadTopSongsCount(Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopSongsViewModel
    Gets total count of top songs.
    loadTopSongsWindow(int, int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopSongsViewModel
    Loads a window of top songs with pagination.
    loadWeeklyReport(int, int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.WeeklyReportViewModel
    Loads weekly report data asynchronously for a given year and week.
    loadWrappedData(int, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.YearEndReportViewModel
    Loads all wrapped data for year on a background thread, then calls onSuccess on the JavaFX thread.
    logError(String, String, Exception) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.AppUtils
     
    login(String, String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.AuthenticationService
    Attempts to authenticate a user by username or email and password.
    LoginAttemptService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
    Tracks failed login attempts per username and enforces escalating lockout periods to protect against brute force attacks.
    LoginAttemptService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
